machine_model.default_materials: Generic PETG @SPARKX i7-all;Generic PLA @SPARKX i7-all;CR-PLA Matte @SPARKX i7-all;Generic PLA Silk @SPARKX i7-all
machine_model.name: Creality SPARKX i7

data.change_filament_gcode:
{if toolchange_count > 1 }
G17
G2 Z{z_after_toolchange + 0.4} I0.86 J0.86 P1 F10000
{endif}
G1 X0 F18000
M106 S120
M8200 P S[next_extruder]
M220 S100
{if long_retractions_when_cut[previous_extruder]}
{if retraction_distances_when_cut[previous_extruder] < 28}
M8200 R E-{retraction_distances_when_cut[previous_extruder]}
{else}
M8200 R E-28
{endif}
{endif}

M400
G1 X5 F10000
SET_VELOCITY_LIMIT ACCEL=5000 ACCEL_TO_DECEL=500
G0 F500

M8200 C S0
SET_VELOCITY_LIMIT ACCEL=5000 ACCEL_TO_DECEL=5000
G0 Y255 F18000
G0 X267 F18000
G0 Y130 F18000 
G0 X278 F2400 
M8200 R
M106 S30
M104 S[nozzle_temperature_range_high[previous_extruder]]
M8200 L I[next_extruder]
{if long_retractions_when_cut[previous_extruder]}
{if retraction_distances_when_cut[previous_extruder] < 28}
G1 E{retraction_distances_when_cut[previous_extruder]} F{filament_max_volumetric_speed[initial_no_support_extruder]*100} 
{else}
G1 E28 F{filament_max_volumetric_speed[initial_no_support_extruder]*100}
{endif}
{endif}
T[next_extruder]

{if flush_length_1 > 1}
;flush_length_1=[flush_length_1]
; FLUSH_START
M106 S70
{if flush_length_2 > 1}
M104 S[nozzle_temperature_range_high[next_extruder]]
{else}
M104 S[new_filament_temp]
{endif}
{if flush_length_1 > 32}
G1 F60
M400
G1 E32 F{filament_max_volumetric_speed[initial_no_support_extruder]*100}
G1 E{(flush_length_1 - 32) * 0.02} F60
M400
M106 S180
G4 P2500
M106 S30
G1 E-[retraction_length] F1800
G0 X267 F24000  
G0 X278 F2400  
G0 X267 F24000
G0 X278 F2400
M400
M106 S70
G1 E[retraction_length] F60
G1 E{(flush_length_1 - 32) * 0.23} F{filament_max_volumetric_speed[initial_no_support_extruder]*100}
G1 E{(flush_length_1 - 32) * 0.02} F60
G1 E{(flush_length_1 - 32) * 0.23} F{filament_max_volumetric_speed[initial_no_support_extruder]*100}
G1 E{(flush_length_1 - 32) * 0.02} F60
M400
M106 S180
G4 P2500
M106 S30
G1 E-[retraction_length] F1800
G0 X267 F24000  
G0 X278 F2400  
G0 X267 F24000
G0 X278 F2400
M400
M106 S70
G1 E[retraction_length] F60
G1 E{(flush_length_1 - 32) * 0.23} F{filament_max_volumetric_speed[initial_no_support_extruder]*100}
G1 E{(flush_length_1 - 32) * 0.02} F60
G1 E{(flush_length_1 - 32) * 0.23} F{filament_max_volumetric_speed[initial_no_support_extruder]*100}
{else}
G1 E{flush_length_1} F{filament_max_volumetric_speed[initial_no_support_extruder]*100}
{endif}
{else}
M104 S[new_filament_temp]
{endif}

M400
M106 S180
G4 P2500
M106 S30
G1 E-[old_retract_length_toolchange] F1800
; FLUSH_END

; WIPE
SET_VELOCITY_LIMIT ACCEL=10000 ACCEL_TO_DECEL=10000
G0 X267 F24000 
G0 X278 F2400 
G0 X267 F24000 
G0 X278 F2400 

{if flush_length_2 > 1}
;flush_length_2=[flush_length_2]
; FLUSH_START
{if flush_length_3 < 1}
M104 S[new_filament_temp]
{endif}
SET_VELOCITY_LIMIT ACCEL=5000 ACCEL_TO_DECEL=5000
M400
M106 S70
G1 F60
G1 E{flush_length_2 * 0.18 + old_retract_length_toolchange} F{filament_max_volumetric_speed[initial_no_support_extruder]*100}
G1 E{flush_length_2 * 0.02} F60
G1 E{flush_length_2 * 0.18} F{filament_max_volumetric_speed[initial_no_support_extruder]*100}
G1 E{flush_length_2 * 0.02} F60
G1 E{flush_length_2 * 0.18} F{filament_max_volumetric_speed[initial_no_support_extruder]*100}
M400
M106 S180
G4 P2500
M106 S30
G1 E-[retraction_length] F1800
G0 X267 F24000  
G0 X278 F2400  
G0 X267 F24000
G0 X278 F2400
M400
M106 S70
G1 E[retraction_length] F60
G1 E{flush_length_2 * 0.02} F60
G1 E{flush_length_2 * 0.18} F{filament_max_volumetric_speed[initial_no_support_extruder]*100}
G1 E{flush_length_2 * 0.02} F60
G1 E{flush_length_2 * 0.18} F{filament_max_volumetric_speed[initial_no_support_extruder]*100}
G1 E{flush_length_2 * 0.02} F60

M400
M106 S180
G4 P2500
M106 S30
G1 E-[new_retract_length_toolchange] F1800
; FLUSH_END

; WIPE
SET_VELOCITY_LIMIT ACCEL=10000 ACCEL_TO_DECEL=10000
G0 X267 F24000 
G0 X278 F2400 
G0 X267 F24000 
G0 X278 F2400 
{endif}

{if flush_length_3 > 1}
;flush_length_3=[flush_length_3]
; FLUSH_START
{if flush_length_4 < 1}
M104 S[new_filament_temp]
{endif}
SET_VELOCITY_LIMIT ACCEL=5000 ACCEL_TO_DECEL=5000
M400
M106 S70
G1 F60
G1 E{flush_length_3 * 0.18 + new_retract_length_toolchange} F{filament_max_volumetric_speed[initial_no_support_extruder]*100}
G1 E{flush_length_3 * 0.02} F60
G1 E{flush_length_3 * 0.18} F{filament_max_volumetric_speed[initial_no_support_extruder]*100}
G1 E{flush_length_3 * 0.02} F60
G1 E{flush_length_3 * 0.18} F{filament_max_volumetric_speed[initial_no_support_extruder]*100}
M400
M106 S180
G4 P2500
M106 S30
G1 E-[retraction_length] F1800
G0 X267 F24000  
G0 X278 F2400  
G0 X267 F24000
G0 X278 F2400
M400
M106 S70
G1 E[retraction_length] F60
G1 E{flush_length_3 * 0.02} F60
G1 E{flush_length_3 * 0.18} F{filament_max_volumetric_speed[initial_no_support_extruder]*100}
G1 E{flush_length_3 * 0.02} F60
G1 E{flush_length_3 * 0.18} F{filament_max_volumetric_speed[initial_no_support_extruder]*100}
G1 E{flush_length_3 * 0.02} F60

M400
M106 S180
G4 P2500
M106 S30
G1 E-[new_retract_length_toolchange] F1800
; FLUSH_END

; WIPE
SET_VELOCITY_LIMIT ACCEL=10000 ACCEL_TO_DECEL=10000
G0 X267 F24000 
G0 X278 F2400 
G0 X267 F24000 
G0 X278 F2400 
{endif}

{if flush_length_4 > 1}
;flush_length_4=[flush_length_4]
; FLUSH_START
SET_VELOCITY_LIMIT ACCEL=5000 ACCEL_TO_DECEL=5000
M400
M106 S70
G1 F60
G1 E{flush_length_4 * 0.18 + new_retract_length_toolchange} F{filament_max_volumetric_speed[initial_no_support_extruder]*100}
G1 E{flush_length_4 * 0.02} F60
G1 E{flush_length_4 * 0.18} F{filament_max_volumetric_speed[initial_no_support_extruder]*100}
G1 E{flush_length_4 * 0.02} F60
G1 E{flush_length_4 * 0.18} F{filament_max_volumetric_speed[initial_no_support_extruder]*100}
M400
M106 S180
G4 P2500
M106 S30
G1 E-[retraction_length] F1800
G0 X267 F24000  
G0 X278 F2400  
G0 X267 F24000
G0 X278 F2400
M400
M106 S70
G1 E[retraction_length] F60
G1 E{flush_length_4 * 0.02} F60
G1 E{flush_length_4 * 0.18} F{filament_max_volumetric_speed[initial_no_support_extruder]*100} 
G1 E{flush_length_4 * 0.02} F60
G1 E{flush_length_4 * 0.18} F{filament_max_volumetric_speed[initial_no_support_extruder]*100}
G1 E{flush_length_4 * 0.02} F60

M400
M106 S180
G4 P2500
M106 S30
G1 E-[new_retract_length_toolchange] F1800
; FLUSH_END

; WIPE
SET_VELOCITY_LIMIT ACCEL=10000 ACCEL_TO_DECEL=10000
G0 X267 F24000 
G0 X278 F2400 
G0 X267 F24000 
G0 X278 F2400 
{endif}


SET_VELOCITY_LIMIT ACCEL=5000 ACCEL_TO_DECEL=5000
G0 X267 F2400 
M8200 O
data.machine_end_gcode:
G1 E-0.8 F2400 ; retract
G2 Z{position[2]+3} I0.86 J0.86 P1 F10000 ; spiral lift a little from second lift
G92 E0 ; zero the extruder
{if print_sequence == "by object"}
G0 Z{max_layer_z + 1} F1800
{endif}
G1 X0 Y180 F8000
END_PRINT
data.machine_start_gcode:
M140 S0
M104 S0 
START_PRINT EXTRUDER_TEMP=[nozzle_temperature_initial_layer] BED_TEMP=[bed_temperature_initial_layer_single]
M83 
M8200 P S[initial_no_support_extruder]
M220 S100

SET_VELOCITY_LIMIT ACCEL=5000 ACCEL_TO_DECEL=5000
G0 X267 F18000 
G0 X278 F2400
M104 S[nozzle_temperature_initial_layer]
M106 S0
T[initial_no_support_extruder]

M8200 O
M204 S2000
G1 Z3 F600
M83
G1 Y0 F12000
G1 X150 F30000
G1 Z0.2 F600
G1 X120 Y0 E15 F{filament_max_volumetric_speed[initial_extruder]/0.3*60*0.1}
G1 X115 E.3742  F{outer_wall_volumetric_speed/(0.3*0.5)/4*60}
G1 X110 E.3742  F{outer_wall_volumetric_speed/(0.3*0.5)*60}
G1 X105 E.3742  F{outer_wall_volumetric_speed/(0.3*0.5)/4*60}
G1 X100 E.3742  F{outer_wall_volumetric_speed/(0.3*0.5)*60}
G1 X95 E.3742  F{outer_wall_volumetric_speed/(0.3*0.5)/4*60}
G91
G1 X-1 Z-0.3
G1 X-4
G92 E0
data.name: Creality SPARKX i7 0.2 nozzle
data.time_lapse_gcode:
{if !spiral_mode && print_sequence != "by object" && layer_num != 0}
;don't support timelapse gcode in spiral_mode and by object sequence for I3 structure printer
;time lapse begin
M5001 G92 E0
M5001 G17
M5001 G2 Z{layer_z + 0.4} I0.86 J0.86 P1 F20000 ; spiral lift a little
M5001 G1 X267 Y110 F24000 ; move to safe pos
M5001 P15
M5001 M400 P300
M5001 G92 E0
;time lapse end
{endif}

data.machine_end_gcode:
G1 E-0.8 F2400 ; retract
G2 Z{position[2]+3} I0.86 J0.86 P1 F10000 ; spiral lift a little from second lift
G92 E0 ; zero the extruder
{if print_sequence == "by object"}
G0 Z{max_layer_z + 1} F1800
{endif}
G1 X0 Y180 F8000
END_PRINT
